layers.description: Global stylesheets, Tailwind theme, and design tokens

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: End-to-end, integration, and unit tests

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with README to understand project purpose, tech stack, and architecture.

tour.title: Application Configuration
tour.description: Astro config and middleware define server behavior and page rendering.

tour.title: Layout & Navigation
tour.description: BaseLayout provides consistent page structure with Navbar and Footer.

tour.title: Homepage & Sections
tour.description: The homepage is composed of reusable sections like Hero, Stats, FAQ, Wakaf, and Testimonials.

tour.title: UI Component System
tour.description: Reusable UI components: Button, Card, Icon, Badge, Container form the design system.

tour.title: Sanity CMS Schemas
tour.description: Content schemas define data models for blog posts, activities, FAQs, programs, and site settings.

tour.title: Content Collections & Blog
tour.description: Markdown content collections store blog articles and kegiatan content.

tour.title: API Endpoints
tour.description: API routes handle gallery data, likes, health checks, and contact forms.

tour.title: Gallery System
tour.description: Google Drive integration with KV caching powers the photo gallery feature.

tour.title: Data Layer & Utilities
tour.description: Central site data and shared utilities drive content across all pages.

tour.title: Styling & Design Tokens
tour.description: Tailwind CSS custom theme, design tokens, and global styles.

tour.title: Testing & Quality Assurance
tour.description: E2E tests with Playwright, integration tests, and Lighthouse audits.
